prose:
Single-point total electronic energy — semi-empirical GFN2-xTB (no Gaussian basis), tight-binding Hamiltonian implemented in xtb vX (via ASE interface), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz taken as-is (no re-optimization).

The calculation **failed to converge** — xtb’s self-consistent charge (SCC) cycle did not reach convergence and the engine aborted (see live log at /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/sp_20260618-164601.out). Because the SCF did not converge, no reliable total energy was produced, and none is reported here.
